summary: Transition Flash White component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的白闪转场组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/transition-flash-white/src/TransitionFlashWhite.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TransitionFlashWhite` and `transitionFlashWhiteDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Transition Flash White Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/transition-flash-white to my project. Preserve the exported TransitionFlashWhiteProps API and register the TransitionFlashWhite composition with the default props.
